evals.name: data-anomaly-detection
evals.prompt: 帮我检查一下最近24小时水库水位数据有没有异常值，用MAD算法检测一下
evals.expected_output: The hermes agent should route this to powerelf-data-governance skill for MAD anomaly detection

evals.name: missing-data-check
evals.prompt: 最近一周河道水位监测数据有没有缺失？哪些站点有数据缺失的情况？
evals.expected_output: The hermes agent should route this to powerelf-data-governance skill for missing data detection

evals.name: data-quality-overview
evals.prompt: 帮我评估一下最近一个月所有监测站点的数据质量，给出质量评分和问题汇总
evals.expected_output: The hermes agent should route this to powerelf-data-governance skill for data quality scoring

evals.name: offline-stagnation
evals.prompt: 检查哪些传感器最近有离线或者数据卡滞的问题
evals.expected_output: The hermes agent should route this to powerelf-data-governance skill for offline/stagnation detection

evals.name: data-interpolation
evals.prompt: 水位数据有缺失，帮我用插值方法补全缺失的部分
evals.expected_output: The hermes agent should route this to powerelf-data-governance skill for data interpolation

evals.name: general-data-problem
evals.prompt: 监测数据是不是有问题？帮我看看数据质量怎么样
evals.expected_output: The hermes agent should route this to powerelf-data-governance skill for data quality overview
